_comment: OPERATOR-EDITABLE (reach-channels charter, records/2026-07-14_reach_channels_charter_DRAFT.md). Which feeds/lists are IN is the operator's curation act (pond-naming). No feed may be added that requires ranking to be useful. trade_press URLs verified live 2026-07-14 (curl -> HTTP 200, parseable RSS 2.0): Utility Dive, Fierce Network (the successor brand of Fierce Telecom -- fiercetelecom.com itself now 403s behind Cloudflare), FreightWaves, Chemical & Engineering News.
